memory.summary: I notice the leisure option and easy chore, but with my project due Thursday, I feel a pull to prioritize my team's needs over immediate relaxation.

desires: Ensure my teammates in 'cohort_3' feel supported and that I haven't let the group down, even if it means skipping my planned leisure time.
Avoid any potential friction or awkwardness with my team by proactively addressing their needs before they have to ask.
Protect my long-term ability to contribute effectively to the project by maintaining a sustainable pace, rather than burning out now.
Maintain the high trust and closeness (7.6/7) I have with my close friends by demonstrating reliability through action.

goals.description: Complete the 'quick_chore' immediately to secure a small win and clear mental space, ensuring I don't appear unreliable or scattered to my cohort.
goals.rationale: My high value on relationships (0.5) and desire to avoid friction means even trivial tasks must be handled promptly to maintain trust with 'cohort_3'. This aligns with my 'deliberate' nature by clearing immediate obstacles before long-term planning.

goals.description: Decline the 'leisure_now' event to protect my long-term energy reserves for the term project due Thursday, prioritizing sustainable contribution over immediate relaxation.
goals.rationale: While I crave connection, my 'avoidant' trait regarding conflict means I cannot afford to burn out and fail the group later. My 'deliberate' time horizon dictates investing effort now to ensure I can support my teammates effectively in the future without resentment.

goals.description: Begin working on the 'future_project' for a focused 60-minute block, then check in with 'teammate_A' to offer assistance before they need it.
goals.rationale: Starting work is necessary given the deadline, but my primary driver is relational maintenance. Proactively reaching out to 'teammate_A' prevents awkwardness and demonstrates reliability, satisfying my core need to be a supportive, non-conflicting team member.

agent.last_reasoning: Advances the critical term project (g3) while avoiding immediate leisure burnout (g2). I'll pause soon to message teammate_A, ensuring my reliability isn't compromised by isolation.
